title: Basic View
description: Use the View component to create a container with a background color and some padding.
problemStatement:
The building block! Create a `<View>` container that wraps a `<Text>` component. Set the `backgroundColor` of the View to `"lightblue"` and add `padding: 20` using an inline style.

**Requirement:** Use the `style` prop of the `View` component.
hints: A `View` is the most fundamental component for building a UI, similar to a `div` in web.
expectedOutput: A light blue container with some text inside and spacing around the edges
